tasks.title: Develop XML format for transcripts
tasks.description: Create an XML schema to represent word transcripts and annotations with time-stamps for words and phone boundaries.

tasks.title: Implement time-line tag in XML
tasks.description: Define a time-line tag in the XML format that includes multiple sections with IDs for referencing.

tasks.title: Optimize phone-level data representation
tasks.description: Develop a binary representation for phone-level data to reduce file size and improve parsing efficiency.

tasks.title: Complete English parser implementation
tasks.description: Ensure the English parser performs all functions of the German parser and handles various sentence structures correctly.

tasks.title: Modify parser templates for English
tasks.description: Update the parser templates to replace German terms with their English equivalents and ensure proper capitalization.

tasks.title: Get parser interface working
tasks.description: Continue development on the parser interface to ensure it functions correctly with the existing system.

tasks.title: Construct suitable interfaces and belief-net module
tasks.description: Develop interfaces and a belief-net module to infer user intentions from utterances and augment M-three-L structures.

tasks.title: Write XML tags for dialogue manager
tasks.description: Implement XML tags for the dialogue manager to facilitate communication with the synthesis module.

tasks.title: Generate XML tree from LISP notation
tasks.description: Create a tool to convert LISP notation into an XML tree structure for syntactic generation.

tasks.title: Develop general construction parser
tasks.description: Implement a parser for general constructions to enhance the system's flexibility in handling various syntactic structures.

tasks.title: Work on belief-net semantics
tasks.description: Define the parameters and choices for the belief-net inference engine, ensuring it can handle various decision nodes effectively.

tasks.title: Implement decision nodes for user intentions
tasks.description: Create decision nodes that represent user intentions for entering, viewing, or approaching objects, ensuring they are linked to the belief-net.

tasks.title: Define conditional probabilities for user decisions
tasks.description: Establish conditional probabilities related to user financial states and their willingness to visit locations based on costs.

tasks.title: Define XML schema for Bayes-net input
tasks.description: Create an XML schema that specifies permissible structures for input into the Bayes-net, including situation nodes and their attributes.

tasks.title: Implement XSL transformation for Java Bayes format
tasks.description: Develop an XSL transformation to convert the defined XML schema into the format required by Java Bayes.

tasks.title: Extract relevant decision node data from output
tasks.description: Implement functionality to extract specific decision node data from the output of the Bayes-net based on user queries.

tasks.title: Enable system to generate questions based on understanding
tasks.description: Develop functionality that allows the system to produce questions based on its understanding of user intentions and contextual conditions.

tasks.title: Create script to test system's question generation
tasks.description: Write a script that changes all the settings and goes through all permutations to test the system's ability to generate appropriate questions.

tasks.title: Write new set of tree combining rules
tasks.description: Develop a new set of tree combining rules for the synthesizer's XML trees, ensuring they are similar to the previous rules.

tasks.title: Run SmartKom system on ICSI Linux machines
tasks.description: Ensure the SmartKom system runs on the ICSI Linux machines, increasing the number of operational systems.

tasks.title: Parser'ı tamamla
tasks.description: Tablet tabanlı parser'ın tamamlanması ve stratejilerin değiştirilmesi.

tasks.title: Sentezleme işlemlerini geliştir
tasks.description: Fey'in sentezleme işlemleri üzerinde çalışması.

tasks.title: Refactor PRM classes
tasks.description: Simplify the PRM structure by reducing decision nodes and optimizing class relationships for user, site, and query.

tasks.title: Investigate PRM interpreter availability
tasks.description: Research and track down existing PRM interpreters to determine if we can utilize one for our implementation.

tasks.title: Build a pre-amp for microphones
tasks.description: Design and construct a pre-amplifier that reduces noise and supports multiple microphone inputs.

tasks.title: Implement scanner program for forms
tasks.description: Develop a scanner program that scans forms and processes the data for transcription.

tasks.title: Develop transcription tool
tasks.description: Create a tool for transcribing meetings, including speaker change identification and word transcripts.

tasks.title: Add multi-mixture support for speech and nonspeech detection
tasks.description: Enhance the existing HMM-based system to support multiple Gaussian mixtures for both speech and nonspeech detection.

tasks.title: Improve speaker change point detection
tasks.description: Modify the existing algorithm to include non-silence boundaries for detecting speaker change points.

tasks.title: Optimize silence portion detection parameters
tasks.description: Adjust the minimum length parameters for silence detection to improve the accuracy of pause and utterance boundary detection.

tasks.title: Fix synchronization bug in audio channels
tasks.description: Identify and resolve the glitch causing channels to become asynchronous during recording, ensuring accurate audio transcription.

tasks.title: Improve transcription accuracy
tasks.description: Analyze and enhance the transcription algorithm to reduce the overall error rate, particularly addressing issues observed during the first twenty minutes of audio.

tasks.title: Extract digits from transcripts
tasks.description: Use existing scripts to extract actual digits from the transcripts, ensuring to handle false starts and misreads.

tasks.title: Enter metadata for digit recordings
tasks.description: Input name, time, and date information into the system to accompany the digit recordings.

tasks.title: Fix parsable key files
tasks.description: Identify and correct key files that were manually created and are not automatically parsable.

tasks.title: Update speaker form instructions
tasks.description: Add instructions to read digits as single digits instead of connected numbers, providing examples for clarity.

tasks.title: Parse channelized transcripts for beep insertion
tasks.description: Develop a parser to analyze the output of channelized transcripts and determine the appropriate locations for beep insertions.

tasks.title: Run boundary adjustment on transcripts
tasks.description: Execute Thilo's tool on the transcripts to adjust the boundaries and ensure accuracy before sending to IBM.

tasks.title: Test SRI system on TI-digits dataset
tasks.description: Run the current SRI system recognizer on the TI-digits test set to compare performance metrics.

tasks.title: Replace Andrea microphone with Shure
tasks.description: Test the Shure microphone to ensure it works properly before replacing the Andrea microphone.

tasks.title: Purchase additional wireless microphones
tasks.description: Acquire two more Crown microphones to ensure adequate audio quality for meetings.

tasks.title: Transition to all wireless microphone system
tasks.description: Replace existing wired microphones with wireless ones to streamline the audio setup.

tasks.title: Create tool for beep insertion and deletion
tasks.description: Develop a tool that simplifies the process of inserting and deleting beeps in the Channeltrans format to improve synchronization.

tasks.title: Implement forced alignment for individual channels
tasks.description: Run a forced alignment process that includes beeps as words to identify errors in the transcription for individual channels.

tasks.title: Train beep model for transcription
tasks.description: Create a model that recognizes beeps as unique words to improve transcription accuracy.

tasks.title: Generate beep and digit audio for transcription
tasks.description: Create a script to generate audio beeps followed by digits for use in transcription, ensuring clarity and ease of use for transcribers.

tasks.title: Implement automatic segmentation for meeting recognition
tasks.description: Develop a system to perform recognition on automatically segmented audio instead of hand-segmented audio to improve accuracy.

tasks.title: Create chunked audio files for transcription
tasks.description: Generate chunked audio files that include beeps and digits for easier transcription by the team.

tasks.title: Implement information retrieval using THISL tools
tasks.description: Develop a command line tool for indexing and querying meeting data, allowing users to input keywords and retrieve start-end times of relevant segments.

tasks.title: Create user interface for THISL tools
tasks.description: Design a user-friendly GUI for the THISL information retrieval tool that allows users to query and play audio segments based on search results.

tasks.title: Port THISL tools to Windows
tasks.description: Modify the THISL information retrieval tools to ensure compatibility with Windows operating systems, addressing compilation issues.

tasks.title: Add filtering by meeting type and user ID
tasks.description: Implement filtering functionality in the front-end based on meeting type (MR, EDU, etc.) and user ID.

tasks.title: Optimize Transcriber interface
tasks.description: Enhance the Transcriber interface to include an additional window for displaying an arbitrary valued function synchronized with the waveform.

tasks.title: Optimize Transcriber tool loading speed
tasks.description: Investigate and fix the slow loading issue of the Transcriber tool when handling larger transcript files.

tasks.title: Display multiple waveforms in Transcriber
tasks.description: Implement functionality to display more than one waveform simultaneously in the Transcriber tool.

tasks.title: Fix Transcriber shape file computation bug
tasks.description: Resolve the bug in Transcriber that causes crashes when computing the shape file with low sample rates.

tasks.title: Implement audio playback feature in Transcriber
tasks.description: Add functionality to play audio files in the Transcriber tool without displaying the waveform.

tasks.title: Prepare French test data
tasks.description: Create a digit French database of microphone speech downsampled to eight kilohertz, add noise using Aurora-two noises for training and testing.

tasks.title: Develop HTK baseline for French test data
tasks.description: Implement HTK baseline using mel cepstra for the prepared French test data.

tasks.title: Redo experiments with PLP and delta
tasks.description: Train the net with PLP and delta to evaluate performance improvements.

tasks.title: Combine PLP and MSG features
tasks.description: Investigate the combination of PLP and MSG features to improve recognition accuracy.

tasks.title: Feature combination experiments
tasks.description: Conduct experiments using different feature combinations and net outputs.

tasks.title: Implement recursive filtering routine
tasks.description: Develop a routine that performs recursive filtering using the newly designed IIR filters.

tasks.title: Add low-pass filter for downsampling
tasks.description: Implement a low-pass filter at twenty-five hertz to improve downsampling process.

tasks.title: Optimize online normalization filter
tasks.description: Refactor the online normalization process to reduce the delay caused by the current filter implementation.

tasks.title: Implement noise removal feature
tasks.description: Integrate noise removal functionality based on Ericsson's approach into the existing system.

tasks.title: Modify spectral subtraction code
tasks.description: Adapt Barry's spectral subtraction code for initial testing with the Italian database features.

tasks.title: Write unit tests for recognition scripts
tasks.description: Develop unit tests for the recognition scripts that will be used on Meeting Recorder digits.

tasks.title: Implement digital filter for data processing
tasks.description: Apply the suggested digital filter to the collected data before processing to mitigate noise effects.

tasks.title: Check high-pass filter usage in Feacalc
tasks.description: Verify if the high-pass filter option is being utilized in the Feacalc software when processing data.

tasks.title: Optimize transition probabilities in HMM
tasks.description: Adjust the self-loop transition probabilities in the HMM to improve recognition rates based on recent findings.

tasks.title: Optimize HTK training iterations
tasks.description: Reduce the number of iterations in HTK training from four rounds to three, two, two, five to improve training speed without significant loss in accuracy.

tasks.title: Compile HTK for Linux
tasks.description: Compile the HTK software for Linux machines to enable running experiments on a five-processor Linux machine.

tasks.title: Update .CSHRC for environment detection
tasks.description: Modify the .CSHRC file to detect whether the environment is Linux or Sparc and point to the correct executables.

tasks.title: Explore phase normalization techniques
tasks.description: Investigate methods to normalize phase in speech processing to improve performance.

tasks.title: Decrease number of iterations in HTK system
tasks.description: Adjust the number of iterations in the HTK system to allow for more experiments while working on variations.

tasks.title: Increase number of Gaussians in silence model
tasks.description: Experiment with increasing the number of Gaussians in the silence model to improve recognition accuracy.

tasks.title: Adjust insertion penalties for noise handling
tasks.description: Run experiments with different insertion penalties on the front-end to evaluate performance improvements in noisy conditions.

tasks.title: Optimize mel cepstrum parameters
tasks.description: Experiment with the number of states and Gaussians in mel cepstrum to improve performance metrics.

tasks.title: Modify recognizer for long silences
tasks.description: Adjust the recognizer algorithm to account for long silences in voice activity detection.

tasks.title: Improve mel spectrum estimation
tasks.description: Develop methods to provide a better initial estimate of the mel spectrum that is more robust to noise.

tasks.title: Explore LPC model for noise robustness
tasks.description: Investigate the use of LPC model spectrum instead of Fourier spectrum to improve robustness against noise.

tasks.title: Implement noise addition technique
tasks.description: Add a moderate amount of noise to training data to reduce the effect of additive noise during recognition.

tasks.title: Develop voice-unvoice detection feature
tasks.description: Implement a new feature to detect voice, unvoice, and silence using MLP with three outputs and integrate with the Aurora system.

tasks.title: Optimize feature extraction for MLP
tasks.description: Refactor the feature extraction process to improve the input features for the MLP, focusing on the variance of the auto-correlation function.

tasks.title: Experiment with log magnitude spectrum input
tasks.description: Test the performance of the neural net by feeding it the log magnitude spectrum directly to evaluate improvements in voice-unvoice detection.

tasks.title: Implement parallel job execution script
tasks.description: Write a script that utilizes 'run command' to execute multiple sub-jobs while limiting the number of concurrent jobs to avoid saturating the network.

tasks.title: Optimize P-make usage for job scheduling
tasks.description: Create a Makefile that defines dependencies for a large number of jobs and utilizes P-make with a specified number of concurrent jobs to optimize resource usage.

tasks.title: Investigate online normalization approaches
tasks.description: Explore different methods for online normalization, including varying time constants and means for silence and speech.

tasks.title: Add noise for smoothing MFCC
tasks.description: Implement a method to add white noise energy to the MFCC processing to achieve smoother results.

tasks.title: Build phoneme recognition system
tasks.description: Develop a system that classifies intermediate categories using multi-band techniques and performs phoneme recognition.

tasks.title: Train on larger dataset for robustness
tasks.description: Train the system on the Macrophone set of read speech to improve robustness against artifacts in re-synthesized audio.

tasks.title: Implement VAD-like processing for low-energy sections
tasks.description: Develop a method to identify and set very low-energy sections to near zero value to improve audio quality.

tasks.title: Integrate mean log magnitude spectral subtraction into SmartKom system
tasks.description: Implement the mean log magnitude spectral subtraction algorithm in the SmartKom system, ensuring it can handle varying lengths of input frames for optimal performance.

tasks.title: Design a filter for mean cepstral subtraction
tasks.description: Create a filter design that can effectively remove low-frequency components while maintaining the integrity of the speech signal in the SmartKom system.

tasks.title: Integrate mean subtraction approach into SmartKom system
tasks.description: Integrate the mean subtraction method into the SmartKom system and determine the optimal data length for training models.

tasks.title: Conduct experiments on analysis window length
tasks.description: Perform experiments varying the analysis window length between one and three seconds under different reverberation conditions and plot the results.

tasks.title: Test varying data lengths for training
tasks.description: Test the impact of varying training data lengths (e.g., 6 seconds vs 12 seconds) on model performance and document findings.

tasks.title: Combine spectral subtraction and Wiener filtering software
tasks.description: Integrate the functionalities of spectral subtraction and Wiener filtering into a single software package that allows for command-line argument parsing to choose between the two methods.

tasks.title: Implement neural network for noise reduction
tasks.description: Develop a neural network that operates on the output from either the Wiener filtering or the spectral subtraction to enhance noise reduction capabilities.

tasks.title: Optimize software for latency
tasks.description: Refactor the software to ensure it meets latency requirements while processing audio signals, considering the constraints discussed in the meeting.

tasks.title: Implement Wiener filtering on FFT bins
tasks.description: Apply Wiener filtering on FFT bins with two-step smoothing of the transfer function, using recursion for time smoothing and a sliding window for frequency smoothing.

tasks.title: Fix noise suppression module
tasks.description: Finalize the noise suppression module that integrates with the existing system, ensuring it effectively handles both noise and reverberation.

tasks.title: Compile Mississippi State recognizer software
tasks.description: Download and compile the Mississippi State recognizer software without issues.

tasks.title: Optimize VAD for latency reduction
tasks.description: Reduce VAD processing time to achieve a latency of 220 milliseconds.

tasks.title: Train tandem network on more data
tasks.description: Increase the training dataset for the tandem network to improve performance.

tasks.title: Implement hierarchical structure for silence probability
tasks.description: Use silence probability from VAD network instead of tandem network to improve accuracy.

tasks.title: Investigate noise estimation methods
tasks.description: Explore alternative noise estimation techniques to enhance tandem network training.
